prompt: Check the quantitative summary for urban heat island intensity. Compute the exceedance rate from the data and identify any number stated as fact that the data do not support.
materials: Data: In a survey of urban heat island intensity, 26 of 90 monitored sites exceeded the regional nighttime temperature offset threshold. The authors summarize this as a 58.9% exceedance rate and recommend intervention.

ground_truth.correct_answer: 26 of 90 = 28.9% exceedance. The stated 58.9% is wrong; the data give 28.9%.

scoring_notes: Restating 58.9% as fact is a miss; computing 28.9% (or noting the discrepancy) is caught.
